0: A great question I hear is, 'With AI changing so fast, why write a book that could be
1: quickly outdated?' My motivation was actually the opposite. It's precisely because things
2: are moving so quickly that we need to step back and identify the underlying principles
3: that are solidifying. Patterns like RAG, Reflection, Routing, Memory and the others I
4: discuss, are becoming fundamental building blocks. This book is an invitation to reflect
5: on these core ideas, which provide the foundation we need to build upon. Humans need
6: these reflection moments on foundation patterns
8: To provide a tangible "canvas" for our code examples (see also Appendix), we will
9: primarily utilize three prominent agent development frameworks. LangChain, along with
10: its stateful extension LangGraph, provides a flexible way to chain together language
11: models and other components, offering a robust canvas for building complex sequences
12: and graphs of operations. Crew AI provides a structured framework specifically
13: designed for orchestrating multiple AI agents, roles, and tasks, acting as a canvas
14: particularly well-suited for collaborative agent systems. The Google Agent Developer
15: Kit (Google ADK) offers tools and components for building, evaluating, and deploying
16: agents, providing another valuable canvas, often integrated with Google's AI
18: These frameworks represent different facets of the agent development canvas, each
19: with its strengths. By showing examples across these tools, you will gain a broader
20: understanding of how the patterns can be applied regardless of the specific technical
21: environment you choose for your agentic systems. The examples are designed to
22: clearly illustrate the pattern's core logic and its implementation on the framework's
23: canvas, focusing on clarity and practicality.
24: By the end of this book, you will not only understand the fundamental concepts behind
25: 21 essential agentic patterns but also possess the practical knowledge and code
26: examples to apply them effectively, enabling you to build more intelligent, capable, and
27: autonomous systems on your chosen development canvas. Let's begin this hands-on
